rules.flag: CTOR below market average — product showcase not converting browsers to buyers
rules.fix: Pin best-selling SKU, demo live, add countdown timer voucher
rules.check_outside: Review product card thumbnails and pricing vs competitors

rules.flag: Short watch time — viewers dropping off early
rules.fix: Open with product demo hook in first 30s, announce giveaway at start
rules.check_outside: Check stream title and thumbnail for mismatch with content

rules.flag: Low follow conversion — audience not converting to followers
rules.fix: Add explicit follow CTA every 10 minutes, offer follower-only discount

rules.flag: Conversion below benchmark — traffic not buying
rules.fix: Introduce flash sale mechanic, limit stock display, host urgency scripting
